title: Data from: Lower-cost eddy covariance for CO2 and H2O fluxes over grassland and agroforestry
source_note: Zenodo dataset containing EddyPro-calculated fluxes and average spectra/cospectra from Mariensee measurement campaigns.
normalization_command: Invoke-WebRequest <Zenodo file download URL> -OutFile references/eddypro/public_spectral/<filename>; Get-FileHash references/eddypro/public_spectral/*.csv -Algorithm MD5,SHA256

qc_mapping.reason: These files are spectra/cospectra fixture artifacts, not per-window Full_Output rows with EddyPro QC flags.

known_limitations: Public Zenodo files are real EddyPro-derived spectral artifacts, but they are not LI-COR official acceptance fixtures.
This subset validates spectra/cospectra parsing and provenance only; it is not a raw-to-final numerical parity claim.
Downloaded files are average spectra/cospectra products, not original high-frequency raw data or EddyPro project files.
The fixture currently covers one conventional EC agroforestry 2020 subset and should be expanded across sites, years, and methods.
